name: onexplayer-apex-tools
description: Decky Loader plugin for OneXPlayer Apex fixes and fan control

scripts.prebuild: echo "export const BUILD_ID = \"build-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)\";" > src/build_info.ts && echo "BUILD_ID = \"build-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)\"" > py_modules/build_info.py
scripts.package: bun run prebuild && rollup -c && rm -rf 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools' && mkdir -p 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/dist' 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/py_modules' 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/assets' && cp package.json plugin.json main.py 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/' && cp dist/index.js 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/dist/' && cp py_modules/*.py 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/py_modules/' && cp -r py_modules/hhd_patches 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/py_modules/hhd_patches' && cp assets/* 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/assets/' && rm -f OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip && zip -r OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools' && rm -rf 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools'
scripts.deploy: bun run package && cp OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip ~/Downloads/ && echo 'Copied OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip to ~/Downloads/'
scripts.install-plugin: bun run package && sudo unzip -o OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip -d ~/homebrew/plugins/ && sudo systemctl restart plugin_loader && echo 'Plugin installed and loader restarted'
